'''loshazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wraparound|wraparound]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wraparound|wraparound]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| loshazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshazithi|loshazithi]] || [[word:loshaziji|loshaziji]] || [[word:loshazishi|loshazishi]] || [[word:loshaziki|loshaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshazuthuthu|loshazuthuthu]] || [[word:loshazujuju|loshazujuju]] || [[word:loshazushushu|loshazushushu]] || [[word:loshazukuku|loshazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshazuthu|loshazuthu]] || [[word:loshazuju|loshazuju]] || [[word:loshazushu|loshazushu]] || [[word:loshazuku|loshazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshazufthuf|loshazufthuf]] || [[word:loshazufjuf|loshazufjuf]] || [[word:loshazufshuf|loshazufshuf]] || [[word:loshazufkuf|loshazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshazethe|loshazethe]] || [[word:loshazeje|loshazeje]] || [[word:loshazeshe|loshazeshe]] || [[word:loshazeke|loshazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshazothotho|loshazothotho]] || [[word:loshazojojo|loshazojojo]] || [[word:loshazoshosho|loshazoshosho]] || [[word:loshazokoko|loshazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshazotho|loshazotho]] || [[word:loshazojo|loshazojo]] || [[word:loshazosho|loshazosho]] || [[word:loshazoko|loshazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshazofthof|loshazofthof]] || [[word:loshazofjof|loshazofjof]] || [[word:loshazofshof|loshazofshof]] || [[word:loshazofkof|loshazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshazïfthïf|loshazïfthïf]] || [[word:loshazïfjïf|loshazïfjïf]] || [[word:loshazïfshïf|loshazïfshïf]] || [[word:loshazïfkïf|loshazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshazïfthïfthïf|loshazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:loshazïfjïfjïf|loshazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:loshazïfshïfshïf|loshazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:loshazïfkïfkïf|loshazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshazïfthïf|loshazïfthïf]] || [[word:loshazïfjïf|loshazïfjïf]] || [[word:loshazïfshïf|loshazïfshïf]] || [[word:loshazïfkïf|loshazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshazïfthïf|loshazïfthïf]] || [[word:loshazïfjïf|loshazïfjïf]] || [[word:loshazïfshïf|loshazïfshïf]] || [[word:loshazïfkïf|loshazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:loshazæthæ|loshazæthæ]] || [[word:loshazæjæ|loshazæjæ]] || [[word:loshazæshæ|loshazæshæ]] || [[word:loshazækæ|loshazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:loshazathatha|loshazathatha]] || [[word:loshazajaja|loshazajaja]] || [[word:loshazashasha|loshazashasha]] || [[word:loshazakaka|loshazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:loshazatha|loshazatha]] || [[word:loshazaja|loshazaja]] || [[word:loshazasha|loshazasha]] || [[word:loshazaka|loshazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:loshazafthaf|loshazafthaf]] || [[word:loshazafjaf|loshazafjaf]] || [[word:loshazafshaf|loshazafshaf]] || [[word:loshazafkaf|loshazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:loshazasha|loshazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshazshësha|loshazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshazrosha|loshazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshazmusha|loshazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshazyasha|loshazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshaznkshësha|goloshaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshaznkrosha|goloshaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshaznkmusha|goloshaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshaznkyasha|goloshaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:loshashazasha|loshashazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshashazshësha|loshashazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshashazrosha|loshashazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshashazmusha|loshashazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshashazyasha|loshashazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshashaznkshësha|goloshashaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshashaznkrosha|goloshashaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshashaznkmusha|goloshashaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshashaznkyasha|goloshashaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:leshæzasha|leshæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:leshæzshësha|leshæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:leshæzrosha|leshæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:leshæzmusha|leshæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:leshæzyasha|leshæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goleshæznkshësha|goleshæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goleshæznkrosha|goleshæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goleshæznkmusha|goleshæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goleshæznkyasha|goleshæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:loshfazasha|loshfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:loshfazshësha|loshfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:loshfazrosha|loshfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:loshfazmusha|loshfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:loshfazyasha|loshfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goloshfaznkshësha|goloshfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goloshfaznkrosha|goloshfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goloshfaznkmusha|goloshfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goloshfaznkyasha|goloshfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
